features.name: read_inout from indexed logic storage in concat assignment
features.description: Code should include sv.logic storage with array indexing and read_inout operations whose results are used directly as operands in comb.concat, then assigned via sv.bpassign to sv.reg

features.name: register init with multiple random extracts concatenation
features.description: Code should include multiple sv.read_inout operations from indexed sv.logic storage feeding into comb.extract, then feeding into comb.concat for register initialization via sv.bpassign

features.name: indexed logic array uarray storage type
features.description: Code should include sv.logic with uarray type used as indexed storage for random value initialization with ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
